title: Cisco IOS-XE — VRF with static routes

source.description: Two VRFs (CUSTOMER_A/B) with RD/RT, interface binding, and VRF-aware static default routes

config.description: Two VRF instances with RD/RT, interface bindings on subinterfaces, and VRF-aware static default routes via upstream

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei VRP equivalent with ip vpn-instance, route-distinguisher, vpn-target (export/import), ip binding, and ip route-static vpn-instance

verification.notes: clean deployable — VRF Cisco→Huawei mapping well-established. Key mappings: ip vrf→ip vpn-instance, rd→route-distinguisher, route-target→vpn-target, ip route vrf→ip route-static vpn-instance. max_level=warning allows style warnings. No capability gaps.
